Off Calendar Jul-18-2019 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disability.
Dept. 514. Judge: Newton Lam. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

James Ghilotti, Esq. appeared with petitioner Tina Walsh, who was present via CourtCall as Guardian ad Litem for Claimant Edward Jensen, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Ms. Walsh Guardian ad Litem for Edward Jensen was filed on November 20, 2014.
Order waiving witness appearance and permitting the Guardian ad Litem to appear via CourtCall was filed on May 20, 2019.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $9,495.49.
Attorney Fees - $3,668.86.
Costs - $184.35.

The net balance of $5,642.28 shall be distributed to petitioner Tina Walsh for deposit into the First Interstate Bank account in the name "Tina Walsh for Edward F. Jensen" to be maintained and managed for Edward Jensen's sole benefit with all distributions made to or on behalf of Edward Jensen.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.
